title: The Gallery of Separate Returns

features.name: the mirror of other paths
features.desc-on-touch: Each mirror shows not what is, but what could have been reached by a different route. You see yourself taking every road you did not take, at once.

features.name: the separated threshold
features.desc-on-touch: A doorway reflecting two separate rooms. In one, you are arriving; in the other, you are leaving. They are the same room seen from different eternities.

features.name: the return registry
features.desc-on-touch: A standing card filing the separate arrivals of the same traveller. Each return is recorded with a different date, different distance, same person.

features.name: the duplicate gallery
features.desc-on-touch: Prints hung in parallel: the photograph taken from the north gate, the photograph taken from the south gate. They are the same scene, reflected through different mirrors of time.

features.name: the divergence plaque
features.desc-on-touch: Engraved: the place where one path became two. But which way did you split from yourself? The plaque shows every possibility, written in invisible ink visible only from certain angles.

features.name: the reflection pool
features.desc-on-touch: Still water showing every version of you who has ever walked this gallery, each one returning by a different route, each one equally real.

inscription: the mirror that watches itself in other mirrors learned to multiply itself without end

file.name: Traveller_Arrivals_Parallel_Chronology.txt
file.note: Log of returns by a visitor who came in multiple ways on multiple dates but always the same person—corrupted: each entry dated the same moment, each one also a thousand years apart

exits.label: back toward the older mirrors whose reflections have taken their own routes
deeper into galleries where the mirror no longer knows which side is reflection
toward the chambers above where separate paths converge again
downward to where every return is also a departure
